selected_dialects.reason: Tube body (OD130/ID110) and both end flanges (OD180, thickness25) share a common axis — revolve_profile for tube+flanges, plus cut_circular_hole_pattern for the M14 holes on PCD150 at each flange.
Multiple independent components: central tube body and two end flanges need to be combined. Boolean union ensures single solid; circular_pattern handles 8x M14 bolt holes per flange.

safety_notes: Generative CAD output is reference geometry only. Not manufacturing-ready, not structurally validated, not certified for production use.
